name: Backend API Main
description: FastAPI application entry point for centaur.tools API - a community-governed registry for AI tools with provenance tracking. Configures and assembles the application by registering route modules (auth, feed, forum, notifications, provenance, registry, search, users, voting) and overriding authentication dependency to use cookie-based auth.

types.name: HealthResponse
types.description: Response structure for health check endpoint

functions.name: health
functions.description: Health check endpoint that returns the operational status of the API. Always returns a successful status indicator.
postconditions: Returns dictionary with 'status' key set to 'ok'

invariants: Nine routers registered: auth, feed, users, registry, search, voting, provenance, forum, notifications

data_access.rationale: Main application module handles HTTP routing and dependency injection. No direct data access; delegates to routers.

side_effects.rationale: Creates FastAPI application instance and registers routers during module load

authority.rationale: Owns the FastAPI application configuration, router registration order, and authentication dependency override behavior
